summary: Gamification System (45 badges) - Backend testing COMPLETE with 21/21 tests PASS. Frontend code review PASS. Frontend UI testing LIMITED due to hardcoded production backend URL.

minor.issue: FIXED: Was returning 500 error due to MongoDB ObjectId not being excluded when user_stats was newly created. Fixed by re-fetching stats after insert with {_id: 0}

integration_issues.issue: Frontend api.ts (line 4) has hardcoded production URL 'https://frikt-backend-production.up.railway.app' instead of using environment variable EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. This prevents preview testing against preview backend.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Update frontend api.ts to use process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL for better testing flexibility
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ 45 badge definitions correctly implemented (27 core + 18 category badges)
✓ BADGES dict in server.py lines 81-173 - all categories present: streak(5), explorer(3), relater(5), creator(3), viral(2 hidden), commenter(3), impact(3), special(3), category_specialist(18)
✓ Hidden badges (drama_influencer, universal_problem) correctly excluded from locked list until earned
✓ Category badges only shown after user posts in that category
✓ Badge progress shown for controllable badges, NOT shown for impact/viral badges (depends on others)
✓ Self-relate prevention working - returns 400 'Cannot relate to your own post'
✓ Visit streak tracking with grace window logic implemented
✓ Test accounts (velvetcrumb, noxloop, etc.) excluded from OG/Early badges
✓ BadgeSection.tsx properly imports api.getMyBadges() and displays badges
✓ CelebrationModal.tsx has confetti support (native only, web fallback)
MINOR FIX APPLIED: get_or_create_user_stats now re-fetches after insert to exclude _id

success_rate.frontend: Code review PASS, UI testing limited by hardcoded production URL

test_credentials.note: Frontend uses hardcoded production URL, backend tests use preview URL correctly

seed_data_creation: Test users created during backend tests include random email prefixes (test_badge_*, badge_ui_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gamification system fully implemented and backend verified. 21 comprehensive tests cover: badge definitions (45 total), user badge status, visit streak tracking, creator badges, relater badges (self-relate blocked), commenter badges, explorer badges, follow user badges, category specialist badges. Frontend components (BadgeSection, CelebrationModal, BadgeContext) are properly integrated but test against production URL.
